---
title: "Teaching"
---

**Visiting Assistant Instructor**\
*Austin College*\
ECO101, Principles of Microeconomics - Fall 2022\
ECO102, Principles of Macroeconomics - Fall 2022\

**Adjunct Instructor**\
*Austin College*\
ECO101, Principles of Microeconomics - Spring 2022\
ECO102, Principles of Macroeconomics - Spring 2022\

**Instructor**\
*University of Texas at Dallas*\
ECON4302, Urban and Regional Economics - Summer 2021\
ECON2302, Principles of Microeconomics - Fall 2020, Spring 2021, Fall 2021\

**Teaching Assitant**\
*University of Texas at Dallas*\
ECON3315, Sports Economics - Spring 2022\
ECON4355, Econometrics - Fall 2019, Spring 2020\
ECON7309, Econometrics II - Fall 2019\
ECON6306, Applied Econometrics - Spring 2018, Fall 2018, Spring 2019\
